rows.label: tev065401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Gi Nagri about the
Larsian way of life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Gi Nagri if anything
is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Other xenoforms often ask me why the
Larsians are possessed with such war-lust.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0002
rows.name:
But they are mistaken. My people
have no love of war. We only take
up arms to ensure our own survival.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Our homeworld was all but
barren—nothing like Mira with
its rich supply of resources.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0004
rows.name:
To keep living, a Larsian had
to train, build strength, and
fight to win his daily bread.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0005
rows.name:
I myself cannot stand the sight of blood, so I took
an apprenticeship with Master De Zing as a swordsmith.
I wage my battles vicariously, you might say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0008
rows.name:
I have taken an apprenticeship
with the master swordsmith De
Zing in order to learn the trade.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0009
rows.name:
But I have far to go. The master makes as
much clear in his frequent scoldings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Still, I take nothing for granted. Now that I am
free of Growth and able to make my living in this
bountiful land, I intend to do so with vigor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0011
rows.name:
I will advance my skills and
become a great smith capable of
forging an unbreakable sword![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0012
rows.name:
The hammer is heavy and the road is
long, but my patience is endless.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_SEL1011
rows.name:
Ask Gi Nagri how events have
changed the Larsian way of life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Gi Nagri about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG1001
rows.name:
By eliminating the Growth, you
have eliminated the greatest threat
to me and my fellow Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG1002
rows.name:
Perhaps we embark now for a
world where the sword no
longer need leave its sheath.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG1003
rows.name:
But unsheathe it my brethren
shall, if for nothing else then
to keep body and mind fit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG1004
rows.name:
And I shall continue my swing of the hammer,
wringing mighty blades from the wisdom and
techniques the master has left to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0013
rows.name:
My master has been making a name for himself
all over again in Cauldros, not as a maker
of blades, but as a wielder of one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0014
rows.name:
From what I have heard, a single
swing is all he needs to put an end
to even the most dire indigen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0015
rows.name:
As for me, I have kept his forge
traditions alive. Every day I swing
my hammer, aiming to improve.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0016
rows.name:
One day, I hope to create a blade
that surprises even the master and
deliver it to him in Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Gi Nagri about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0017
rows.name:
The master truly is remarkable. Now he
endeavors to create an unbreakable sword
massive enough for a Doll to swing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0018
rows.name:
Surely he is the first in this wide
universe to strike upon such a lofty idea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0019
rows.name:
Master De Zing is a Larsian
treasure! A talent without equal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0020
rows.name:
If I must follow him my whole life to
help him achieve his grand dreams, then
I shall—or my name is not Gi Nagri![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_SEL3021
rows.name:
Ask Gi Nagri if he's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0021
rows.name:
Do you know two warriors named
Gi Ziorde and Gi Ziordo? They are
pupils of the famous Go Belg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0022
rows.name:
However, after losing a fight to
some human, they departed on a quest
to train and become stronger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0023
rows.name:
I must say, I envy them. I
have no fellow apprentices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0024
rows.name:
A friendly rival would spur me
on when discouragement with my
work gets the better of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065401_MSG0025
rows.name:
What about you? Have you a companion
who brings out your finest?[ST:wait ]
